title: JOEY Burrard - JOEY Restaurants | The Ultimate in Casual Dining

llm_payload.name: JOEY Burrard
llm_payload.description: Shop, dine and unwind in the heart of downtown. This Vancouver restaurant location features a spacious lounge, dining room and patio, all in a warm modern industrial setting. It is the perfect backdrop when enjoying our globally inspired menu and handcrafted cocktails.

label: highly_relevant
title: West Georgia Restaurant in Downtown Vancouver | Moxies ...

llm_payload.name: Moxies West Georgia
llm_payload.description: Moxies West Georgia is one of the best premium casual restaurants in downtown Vancouver. Newly renovated with floor-to-ceiling windows and lush greenery, it's steps from BC Place, Rogers Arena and the Queen Elizabeth Theater. A favourite downtown Vancouver Happy Hour spot, its exclusive rooftop patio is the perfect destination for lunch, date night or dinner before a game or show. Located at the corner of West Georgia and Cambie Street, the restaurant is steps from Stadium-Chinatown Skytrain Station and minutes from the bustling Vancouver Financial District.
llm_payload.opening_hours: SUN 7am - 12am, MON 7am - 12am, TUES 7am - 12am, WED 7am - 12am, THURS 7am - 12am, FRI 7am - 1am, SAT 7am - 1am

llm_payload.name: Bacchus Restaurant
llm_payload.description: Tucked away inside the Wedgewood, Michelin-Recommended Bacchus Restaurant & Lounge beckons with beautiful Venetian decor, original artwork and impeccable service. Our award winning culinary team blends exquisite European-inspired cuisine with fresh, regional ingredients and sustainably sourced seafood.
llm_payload.opening_hours: Bacchus Restaurant: Breakfast Mon-Sun 7:00 am - 11:00 am; Weekend Brunch Sat-Sun 11:30 am - 2:00 pm; Lunch Mon-Fri 11:30 am - 2:00 pm; Dinner Daily 5:30 pm - 10:00 pm. Bacchus Lounge: Weekend Brunch Sat-Sun 11:30 am - 2:00 pm; Lounge & Cocktails Sun-Thu 2:30 pm - 12:00 am (kitchen closes 11:00 pm), Fri-Sat 2:30 pm - 01:00 am (kitchen closes midnight); Nightly Live Piano Daily.
